prompt: A cinematic dark-anime crossover poster titled DARK LEGENDS, showing 4 iconic male antihero figures standing in a ruined gothic nightmare city at night beneath an enormous blood-red full moon. The composition is a wide dramatic group shot with the characters lined up across the foreground, each facing a slightly different direction with confident, ominous body language. On the far left, 1 soldier-like young man with short dark hair wears a dark green hooded military cloak billowing in the wind, visible tactical harness straps and gear around his waist, and holds 2 steel blades pointed downward; a winged insignia is visible on the back of his cloak. In the center-left, 1 tall white-haired man with spiky hair wears a sleek high-collar black outfit and stands casually with one hand in his pocket, looking dominant and calm. In the center-right, 1 slim brown-haired young man in a wrinkled white button-up shirt holds 1 black notebook close to his chest with the visible cover text “Death Note,” posing with quiet intelligence. On the far right, 1 pale white-haired ghoul-like young man wears torn dark clothing; one glowing red eye is visible and monstrous red-black fleshy tendrils coil outward behind and beside him in 2 large swirling masses. The background is filled with towering ruined cathedral spires and shattered gothic skyscrapers, with many windows glowing crimson from within. The sky is stormy, cloud-choked, and nearly black, lit by the giant red moon centered high behind the group, creating a backlit halo effect and strong rim lighting. Use a dark palette of black, charcoal, deep crimson, and muted steel gray, with high contrast, gritty textures, subtle bloodlike embers, and a hyper-detailed illustrated anime style. Add distressed epic serif typography across the bottom spelling DARK LEGENDS in huge cracked stone-like letters with red glow and weathered texture. The overall feeling is apocalyptic, stylish, menacing, and mythic, like a premium movie or game crossover key art.
